description: A multi-role skill-swap platform interface with stagiaire, mentor, formateur, and admin areas built from static HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files.

file_audit.scope: Visible project files in the workspace tree
notes: The interface folders are present and consistent.
The previously missing assets/js/mes_demandes.js file now exists.
The default avatar asset exists at assets/images/default_avatar.svg.

assets.images: Static image assets used across the interface.

main_folders.pages_stagiaire: Stagiaire-facing pages such as dashboard, login, profile, notifications, requests, and settings.
main_folders.pages_mentor: Mentor-facing pages such as dashboard, marketplace, requests, badges, and help pages.
main_folders.pages_admin: Administrative pages for account management, moderation, dashboard, and statistics.
main_folders.formateur_pages: Trainer/formateur pages for catalogue, dashboard, validation, and statistics.

shared_design_system.layout_pattern: sidebar plus topbar plus main content
shared_design_system.colors: Blue-based palette with neutral grays for borders, backgrounds, and text.
shared_design_system.typography: Inter as the primary font, with consistent sizing across pages.

implemented: Shared assets exist for the main page groups.
Many cross-page navigation links have been normalized.
A missing mes_demandes.js file has already been created.
A default avatar asset is available for profile images.
known_follow_up_work: Restyle pages_mentor pages for softer hover states and consistency.
Replace remaining emoji icons with SVGs.
Verify the formateur and admin links point to the intended pages.
Keep API key work deferred until requested.

important_notes: The interface is currently organized as static front-end pages rather than a full backend application.
Several pages use shared dashboard styles and scripts to reduce duplication.
